question: कौन से पांच ग्रामीण उप-जिलों में बीसीजी टीकाकरण की सर्वाधिक कुल संख्या दर्ज की गई है?

predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.SUB_DISTRICT, 
    SUM(f.BCG_VACCINE) AS total_bcg
FROM 
    FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE f
JOIN 
    DIM_GEOGRAPHY d ON f.GEOGRAPHY_ID = d.GEOGRAPHY_ID
WHERE 
    d.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural'
GROUP BY 
    d.SUB_DISTRICT
ORDER BY 
    total_bcg DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:

    d.SUB_DISTRICT, 
    SUM(f.BCG_VACCINE) AS total_bcg

    FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE f
